editorial_principle: The system does not represent a fairy tale but a set of coupled perceptual fields in which transformation, memory, and activation are structural properties rather than narrative events.

fields.label: campo_del_maleficio
fields.basho: the enchantment is a persistent structural condition: tree, bark, and silence coexist as simultaneous states rather than sequential phases
fields.kokyu: time is suspended; immobility is not duration but constraint without temporal direction
fields.activation_condition: tree presence + recognition of embedded figures
fields.persistence_rule: persists while tree-water coupling remains active
fields.dissolution_rule: only dissolves via mythic threshold event (storm + liberating agent)
fields.textual_anchor_it: come immobilizzate durante un passo di danza da un maleficio che le teneva prigioniere.

fields.label: campo_della_metamorfosi
fields.basho: bark and flesh are not opposites but gradients of a single material continuum
fields.kokyu: transformation compresses centuries of immobility into a single irreversible event
fields.activation_condition: storm + liberating agent + active enchantment field
fields.persistence_rule: persists as embodied memory in all subsequent movement
fields.dissolution_rule: non-dissolvable; becomes structural tension in dance

affects.field-01: transforms enchantment into embodied memory rather than canceling it
affects.field-03: extends activation into residual urban spaces

fields.textual_anchor_it: Le lignee figure tolte all'albero iniziarono ad ammorbidirsi e poi a respirare.

fields.label: campo_del_teatro_abbandonato
fields.basho: the abandoned theatre is a saturated residual system: presence is extracted, not added
fields.kokyu: latency is the dominant temporal regime; activation is punctual, not continuous
fields.activation_condition: arrival of liberated figures + recognition of spatial belonging
fields.persistence_rule: persists through ritual repetition of collective performance
fields.dissolution_rule: partial regression possible, never total erasure
fields.textual_anchor_it: costruzioni diverse, antiche e vuote, resti di luoghi abbandonati o mai abitati.

fields.label: campo_autrice_immagine
fields.basho: author and illustrator are a single generative system: drawing is not origin but first activation of the narrative field
fields.kokyu: creation follows the same rhythm as transformation: involuntary gesture → recognition → retroactive meaning
fields.activation_condition: collapse of distinction between visual and textual production
fields.persistence_rule: persists as unified authorial field across media
fields.dissolution_rule: collapses if writing and image are separated into independent systems
fields.textual_anchor_it: Tutto è cominciato con un mio disegno tracciato a carboncino su un foglio bianco seguendo le onde dei miei pensieri.

system_note.system_behavior: fields operate as coupled constraints: each transformation leaves irreversible structural residue across the system
